Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Proceedings Pending Disposition Of This Motion And Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WACHTELL, LIPTON, ROSEN & KATZ's Motion To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Proceedings Pending Disposition Of This Motion And Arbitration.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

(see word minutes for full details.)

Order is signed,

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. William Reid IV's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF X CORP.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

Appearance (via ZOOM videoconference):
Adrian Sawyer, Esq., specially appearing for plaintiff X Corp;
Joshua J. Bruckerhoff, Esq.; Scott D. Saldana, Esq.; Aaron Brown, Esq.; Julia Di Fiore, Esq., Rober LaCroix, Esq. of REID COLLINS & TSAI LLP; Tel: 512.647.6100, for plaintiff X Corp.

Hearing held. The verified applications of Joshua J. Bruckerhoff, Scott D. Saldana, Aaron Brown, Robert LaCroix and Julia Di Fiore to be admitted as counsel pro hac vice for plaintiff are granted.

William T. Reid, IV shall re-submit his application.

Orders were signed after hearing.

Judge: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
